canonical_payload_consumption.rule: New cockpit must use a single payload adapter rather than preserving duplicate dashboard fetch ownership.

legacy_dashboard_assessment.rule: Current dashboard shells/assets are reference material unless explicitly promoted into new cockpit architecture.

purpose: prepare frontend input map for new enterprise cockpit

safety.note: This pack creates frontend ownership reports only.

search_surface_map.permanent_architecture_rule: Search becomes Claire Command Surface: normal web search + governed research + runtime command + project/system search + future AI-agent entry.
